title: 43cm×3m Christmas Wrapping Paper Rolls,3 Roll Package Xmas Wrapping Gift Wrap Xmas Party with Snow Christmas Tree Black Gold Kraft Paper Roll Wrap Decor
features: 【Christmas Wrapping Paper Set】Include 3roll black and gold Christmas wrapping paper Christmas theme designs and sufficient quantities can meet your various needs for Christmas gift packaging,perfect birthday gift,present boxes,festival decoration for kids boys girls .

【Mini Size】Black and gold wrapping paper roll approx 43cm x 3m, 3 rolls totally 9m/29.5ft long,no crease,you can wrap small meedium size gifts. Gift wrapping paper printed with black and gold metallic gold colors beautiful and shinning,perfect birthday wrapping paper for boys girls.

【Upscale Design】Black and gold wrapping paper rolls are designed in different patterns, using Christmas elements and classic patterns, such as snowflakes, Christmas trees, and a sheet of pure gold metal wrapping paper, which can be matched arbitrarily, is a very good choice for Christmas wrapping paper
【High Quality】Birthday wrapping paper roll made of 100% recyclable and eco-friendly paper,smooth surface,sturdy durable, not easily tear,roll packing easy to use and keep,reusable.

【Widely Application】Perfect for kids boys girls Women man gifts decoration,also great for birthday, christmas,Valentines, Mother's day, Easter,baby shower,wedding,graduation season,holiday gifts packing,craft projects,home decoration,handmade artwork etc.
